member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.Bootstrapper
member.summary: Provides bootstrapping method for accessing components.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.Bootstrapper.Bootstrap(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: A bootstapper for defining compoent into the service collection.
member.param: Service collection object that stores the components definitions.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcCommon
member.summary: This class includes helper functions common to all the DC related tests - Dc, FuncDc, TriggeredDc etc.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcCommon.LowLimitDefaultValue
member.summary: LOW LIMIT DEFAULT VALUE.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcCommon.HighLimitDefaultValue
member.summary: HIGH LIMIT DEFAULT VALUE.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcCommon.NoSamplingCount
member.summary: NO SAMPLING COUNT FOR THIS PIN. Only for NON DUPLICATED PINS!.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcCommon.FailPinsName
member.summary: Gets Fail pins name.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcCommon.CreateDcFailPinInfo(System.String,System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Create FailPinInfo object.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcCommon.StoreFailPinInfoToSharedStorage(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.FailPinInfo},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get storage fail pin information and append with in coming fail pin information. The information will be print at DeviceEndDatalog.
member.param: List of fail pin information to store.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcCommon.TryGetFailPinInfo(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Retrieve fail pin information from sharedStorage.
member.returns: A map of test instance name with respective failPinInfo object.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcCommon.DatalogFailPinInfo(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.FailPinInfo},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Print list of fail pin information to ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcCommon.GetSlotChannelStr(System.String)
member.summary: Get pin slot number and pin channel number in standard format.
member.returns: Standard 7 digit format that consist of pin slot number and pin channel number.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DatalogExtensions
member.summary: test.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DatalogExtensions.GetDcResultFormat(Prime.DatalogService.IDatalogService,Prime.TestMethods.DcDatalogLevel,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: create instance of DcPrinter.
member.param: provide control over printing data to Ituff - ALL - prints both pass and fail data , FAIL - prints fail.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DatalogExtensions.ToUnit(Prime.PlatformService.MeasurementType)
member.summary: Translate measurement type to a letter describing the type (e.g Volt -> V).
member.exception: Couldn't translate measurement type to a letter.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcResultFormat
member.summary: Represent Dc result printing format.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcResultFormat.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.DcDatalogLevel,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: provide control over printing data to Ituff - ALL - prints both pass and fail data , FAIL - prints fail.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcResultFormat.ArrangeDataAsCompressFormat
member.summary: Prints DC results of the pin to datalog in compress format.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcResultFormat.ArrangeDataAsCompressFormatWithPinMap
member.summary: Prints DC results of the pin to datalog in compress format using pin unique identifier instead the pinName.

remarks.para: This method require to be defined a PinMap through the PinService, PinMap should be specified in PinService.json file loaded by aleph infrastructure.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResultFormat
member.summary: Dc Printer interface.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResultFormat.SetData(Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResult)
member.summary: Set Dc results data.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcResult
member.summary: Represents the evaluated Dc measurement results for each pin and pin group. It processes raw measurement data and organizes the results according to pins and pin groups, while also determining if the measurements are within specified limits.
Initializes a new instance of the class. Represents the evaluated DC measurement results for each pin and pin group.
member.param: Raw data of DC measurement results.
Mapping of pins to their respective pin groups in the super pin group.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcResult.GetConsoleString
member.summary: ArrangeDataToConsole.
member.returns: Arranged data to print to console.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.ToStringOptions
member.summary: Options for how to print the results.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.ToStringOptions.OriginalLimits
member.summary: Print the results with the limits that provided when the DcTest object created.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.ToStringOptions.WithDefaultLimits
member.summary: Print the results with default limits.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResult
member.summary: Represents the evaluated Dc measurement results for each pin and pin group. It processes raw measurement data and organizes the results according to pins and pin groups, while also determining if the measurements are within specified limits.

remarks.para: This example demonstrate how to use the Property to iterate through all the measurements.
it travers through the pins, than result blocks, than measurements.
Gets result blocks per group per pin.
This example demonstrate how to use the Property to iterate through all the measurements.
it travers through the groups, than pins, than result blocks, than measurements.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResult.PassingResultsPerPin
member.summary: Gets the passing measurements per pin.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResult.FailingResultsPerPin
member.summary: Gets the failing measurements per pin.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResult.AreAllResultsWithinLimits
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether all results are within limits.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResult.PrintToConsole
member.summary: Print dc results to console.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResult.ToString(System.String,Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.ToStringOptions)
member.summary: Convert results to printable string.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResult.ToString(System.String)
member.summary: Convert results to printable string.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResult.PrintToDatalog
member.summary: Prints dc test results to datalog.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock
member.summary: Interface for Pin result block containing data for group of measurements with common limits.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.PinName
member.summary: Gets or sets the pin name.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.PinGroupName
member.summary: Gets or sets the pin group name.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.SuperPinGroupName
member.summary: Gets or sets the super pin group name.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.MeasurementType
member.summary: Gets or sets the measurement type.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.LowLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the low limit value.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.HighLimit
member.summary: Gets or sets the high limit value.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.Measurements
member.summary: Gets the list of pin results with values and pass/fail status.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.PinPassingResults
member.summary: Gets the list of passing pin results.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.PinFailingResults
member.summary: Gets the list of failing pin results.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.AverageMeasurement
member.summary: Gets the average measurement value of the pin results.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.IsAverageMeasurementWithinLimits
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether checks whether the average measurement is withing limits.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.AddPinResult(System.Double)
member.summary: Add pin result.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.AddPinResults(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Double})
member.summary: Add pin results list.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.AreAllResultsWithinLimits
member.summary: Indicated whether all the results for that pin results block are within limits.
member.returns: whether all the results for that pin results block are within limits.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IPinResultBlock.IsWithinLimits(System.Double)
member.summary: Checks wether the measurement between limits.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.PinResultBlock
member.summary: Represents a group of measurement results of unique pin and pin group with same setup (high/low limits and measurement type).

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.PinResultBlock.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Generates PinResultsBlock object.
member.param: Indicates whether to pre-arrange pass and fail lists for optimization.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.PinResultBlock.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Generates PinResultsBlock object.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver
member.summary: Provide methods to handle the dc instance parameter, the method will validate or adapt the parametes formats.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.LowLimitDefaultValue
member.summary: LOW LIMIT DEFAULT VALUE.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.HighLimitDefaultValue
member.summary: HIGH LIMIT DEFAULT VALUE.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.NoSamplingCount
member.summary: NO SAMPLING COUNT FOR THIS PIN. Only for NON DUPLICATED PINS!.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.ToIntList(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString)
member.summary: Converts a comma-separated string into a list of integers.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.ToDoubleLimitList(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString)
member.summary: Converts a comma-separated string of limits into a list of doubles., for example: "0.05mV,0.07mV" to List (double) { 0.00005, 0.00007 }, "0.05m" to List (double) { 0.00005 }.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.ToDoubleLimitList(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.ToMeasurementType(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a string representation of a measurement type into a MeasurementType object.
member.param: A string representing a measurement type.
member.returns: A MeasurementType object if the input string is valid, otherwise throw FatalException.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.ToMeasurementTypeList(System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.String})
member.summary: Converts a list of measurement type strings into a list of MeasurementType objects.
member.param: A list of measurement type strings.
member.returns: A list of MeasurementType objects corresponding to the string input.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.ToMeasurementTypeList(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString)
member.summary: Converts a CommaSeparatedString measurement type into a list of MeasurementType objects.
member.returns: A list of MeasurementType objects corresponding to the CommaSeparatedString input.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.ValidateLimits(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double},System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: Validates the limits for a given number of pins.
member.param: default limit value in case of empty value.
member.returns: List of doubles with values / empty string in the respective place.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.ValidateMeasurementTypes(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.PlatformService.MeasurementType},System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates a list of measurement types for a given number of pins.
member.returns: List of MeasurementType with either one type for all pins or exact one type per pin.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.ValidateSamplingCount(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},System.Collections.Generic.IList{Prime.PinService.IPin})
member.summary: Validates the sampling count for a list of pins.
member.param: Sampling count parameter received from the instance parameters.
member.returns: List of integers representing the sampling count for each pin.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcParamsResolver.CreatePinsAndGroupsSetup(Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration)
member.summary: Creates a dictionary of pins and groups setup.
member.returns: Dictionary of pins and groups setup.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcTestConfiguration
member.summary: Represent Dc Test configuration. use this class when you provide the instance parameter as is. the class will validate and fix the format if required for the dc parameters.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcTestConfiguration.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.PlatformService.MeasurementType})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Pins as a list of strings.
Measurement types as a list of strings.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcTestConfiguration.HighLimits
member.summary: Sets HighLimits.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcTestConfiguration.LowLimits
member.summary: Sets LowLimits.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcTestConfiguration.SamplingCount
member.summary: Sets SamplingCount.

member.summary: Apply test condition options.

member.summary: Force apply.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.ApplyTestConditionOptions.SmartTc
member.summary: Conditional apply.

member.name: F:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.ApplyTestConditionOptions.None
member.summary: No apply.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration
member.summary: Represent Dc Test configuration. The Dc Test will use that configuration to receive the pins, limits, measurement types and more...

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration.ApplyTestOption
member.summary: Gets or Sets LevelTc type.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration.LevelTestCondition
member.summary: Gets or Sets LevelTc name.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration.DatalogLevel
member.summary: Gets or Sets DatalogLevel.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets or Sets Session context.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration.GetHighLimits
member.summary: Gets a list of double respresnts the test high limits in Volt or Ampare.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration.GetLowLimits
member.summary: Gets a list of double respresnts the test low limits in Volt or Ampare.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration.GetMeasurementTypes
member.summary: Get a list of measurement types.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration.GetSamplingCount
member.summary: Get a list representing the sampling count per mesurement (per pin or pin group).

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration.GetPinList
member.summary: Get a list of pin object based on user input.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcTest
member.summary: DcTest base class.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcTest.#ctor(Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcTest.CreateMeasurementTypesPerPinOrGroup(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.PinService.IPin},System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.PlatformService.MeasurementType})
member.summary: Arrange measurement types per unique pin or group. if there are duplicates pins it will collide them. in can there is pin intersections between groups, the method will return null.
member.returns: Unique Pins and measurement types arranged in dictionary.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcTest.CreateMeasurementTypesPerPin(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.PinService.IPin},System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.PlatformService.MeasurementType})
member.summary: Arrange measurement types per unique pin. if there are duplicates pins it will collide them. this method impact performance as it's ask TOS for measurement per pin and not per group. this method is required for instances where there are pin intersection between groups.
member.returns: Unique Pins and measurement types arranged in dictionary.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcTest.CheckIntersection(Prime.PinService.IPin,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: checks whether the pin is already existed in former different group, or check if the group has intersection with former group.
member.param: Pin or group to check if already exists in different group.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcTestCreator
member.summary: Create a DC Test to be executed.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.DcTestCreator.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. DcTestCreator constructor.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestCreator
member.summary: Factory method for generating Dc Test.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestCreator.Create(Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTestConfiguration)
member.summary:
Create DcTest object with configuration object that hold the dc setup parameters like pins, limtis and more.
use DcTestConfiguration object if you have raw inputs like comma seperated string of pins.
use DcTestResolvedConfiguration object if you already validated the parameters and fixed their format like List<MeasurementType> instead of List<string>.
use DcTestWithSetupConfiguration object if you already create DcSetupConfiguration object before and you want to re-use it.
you can also create your own configuration object as long it's implements IDcTestConfiguration interface.
This example shows how to call the method.
this.DcTest = this.DcTestCreator.Create(new DcTestConfiguration( pins: this.Pins, measurementTypes: this.MeasurementTypes) { HighLimits = this.HighLimits, LowLimits = this.LowLimits, DatalogLevel = this.DatalogLevel, SamplingCount = this.SamplingCount, ApplyTestOption = isFlushSmartTcEnabled ? ApplyTestConditionOptions.ForceApply : ApplyTestConditionOptions.ConditionalApply, LevelTestCondition = this.LevelsTc, }); .
For more information visit - Prime Wiki

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTest
member.summary: A DC Test to be executed.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTest.Execute
member.summary: Executes DC test and retrieve dc result.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTest.SetSuperPinGroup(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String}})
member.summary: Set SuperPinGroup to show as a token in ituff result with datalogLevel=PIN_CHANNEL.
member.remarks: The use of this method is intended for Verify only. Please avoid the use in Execute for test time, It apply for all execute calls.
member.param: Dictionary with pinName or PinGroup as key and SuperPinGroup name to link as value.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTest.GetDcResultFormat
member.summary: Get Dc results format for printing to ituff.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTest.GetDcResult
member.summary: Gets Dc result object, including measurements by group/pin and whether they are pass or fail. this object has functionalities like PrintToDatalog, PrintToConsole and more.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTest.GetMeasurementTypes
member.summary: Get resolved measurement types list.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTest.GetPins
member.summary: Get resolved pins list.
member.returns: Pins list as list of IPin objects.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcTest.GetSamplingCount
member.summary: Get resolved sampling count list.

member.summary: Object to store the values in shared storage.

member.summary: Gets or sets the FailPin Name.

member.summary: Gets or sets the FailPinChannel Number. This is combine of pin slot number and channel number.
